cams.name: Earth from the ISS · NASA Live
cams.description: NASA's official live feed from the International Space Station, orbiting Earth at ~400km, ~16 times per day. Goes black on the night side and during signal dropouts.

cams.name: SpaceX Starbase · Boca Chica
cams.description: LabPadre's 24/7 live feeds of SpaceX's Starship development site. Multiple angles on rocket assembly and test flights.

cams.name: Kīlauea · USGS Webcams
cams.description: USGS Hawaiian Volcano Observatory hosts multiple thermal and visual cameras at the Halemaʻumaʻu crater. Refreshing still images, glowing red during eruptions.

cams.name: Mauna Loa · USGS Webcams
cams.description: USGS still cameras pointed across the Mokuʻāweoweo summit caldera of the world's largest active volcano.

cams.name: Mount Etna · INGV
cams.description: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia hosts live thermal and visible-light cameras on Europe's most active volcano. Frequent visible eruptions and lava flows.

cams.name: Stromboli · Aeolian Islands
cams.description: INGV cams on the continuously-active strombolian eruptions — small bursts every 10-20 minutes, day and night. The lighthouse of the Mediterranean.

cams.name: Old Faithful · Yellowstone
cams.description: NPS hosts a live cam page for Yellowstone's most famous geyser, which erupts every 90 minutes ± 10. The page lists current eruption predictions.

cams.name: AuroraMAX · Yellowknife
cams.seasonalNote: Best Sept-April nights. Often offline during the bright summer months.
cams.description: Canadian Space Agency live all-sky camera in the auroral oval at Yellowknife, NWT. Most spectacular during dark winter nights when the Kp index spikes.

cams.name: Tembe Elephant Park · Africam
cams.description: Live cam at a watering hole in Tembe Elephant Park, KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa. Elephants, leopards, lions visible especially at dawn and dusk.

cams.name: Nkorho Bush Lodge · Sabi Sand
cams.description: Sabi Sand Game Reserve, South Africa. Big Five regularly visit the watering hole.

cams.name: Brooks Falls Brown Bears · Katmai NP
cams.seasonalNote: Live June-October during the salmon run. Offline in winter.
cams.description: Explore.org's famous live cam of brown bears catching salmon mid-air at Brooks Falls, Alaska. Featured in Fat Bear Week each fall.

cams.name: Atlantic Puffin Colony · Heimaey
cams.description: Live cam on the Westman Islands during the Atlantic Puffin breeding season — Iceland hosts ~60% of the world's puffin population.

cams.name: Abbey Road Studios Crossing · London
cams.description: Live view of the famous Beatles album cover crossing on Abbey Road. Tourists pose hourly, 24/7.

cams.name: Times Square · NYC
cams.description: EarthCam's livestream from the Crossroads of the World — Broadway and 7th Avenue.

cams.name: Grand Canal · Rialto Bridge, Venice
cams.description: Skyline Webcams livestream of the Grand Canal at the Rialto Bridge, Venice's busiest waterway.

cams.name: Niagara Falls · Horseshoe Falls
cams.description: Multiple live cams of the Canadian (Horseshoe) Falls — 2,400 cubic meters of water per second.

cams.name: Mauna Kea · Subaru Telescope
cams.description: Subaru Observatory still cam at 4,200m on the world's most powerful astronomical site. Image refreshes throughout each Hawaiian night.

cams.name: McMurdo Station · Antarctica
cams.seasonalNote: Image is dark from May through August (Antarctic winter).
cams.description: USAP refreshing still cam of the largest Antarctic research base. Stays in continuous darkness throughout austral winter.

cams.name: Smithsonian Giant Panda Cam · Washington DC
cams.description: Smithsonian's National Zoo live cam on the giant pandas. Most active during morning feeding times.

cams.name: San Diego Zoo · Multi-cam
cams.description: Multiple live cams across San Diego Zoo — penguins, baboons, polar bears, koalas, tigers.

cams.name: Sakurajima · Kagoshima, Japan
cams.description: Skyline Webcams view of Japan's most active volcano across Kagoshima Bay. Frequent ash plumes — sometimes hourly.

cams.name: Mount Yasur · Vanuatu
cams.description: Tanna Island, Vanuatu. Continuously active for at least 800 years — visible strombolian eruptions every few minutes. VolcanoDiscovery aggregates current cam feeds.

cams.name: Reykjanes · Iceland
cams.description: Live from Iceland's Reykjanes peninsula, site of the 2021–2024 Fagradalsfjall and Sundhnúkur eruptions. Multi-camera stream from RÚV / Iceland's broadcaster.

cams.name: Mount Erebus · Antarctica
cams.description: Earth's southernmost active volcano, with a persistent lava lake. Mount Erebus Volcano Observatory monitoring page.

cams.name: Klyuchevskoy · Kamchatka
cams.description: Eurasia's tallest active volcano (4,750m) on Russia's Kamchatka peninsula. KVERT (Kamchatkan Volcanic Eruption Response Team) cam network.

cams.name: Polar Bears · Churchill, Manitoba
cams.seasonalNote: Live October-November during the bear migration to Hudson Bay sea ice. Offline rest of year.
cams.description: Explore.org's iconic Tundra Buggy cam at Churchill — bears gather here each fall waiting for the Hudson Bay ice to form so they can hunt seals.

cams.name: Pete's Pond · Mashatu Game Reserve
cams.description: Iconic waterhole in Mashatu, eastern Botswana. Elephants, leopards, lions, hyenas — most active at dawn and dusk.

cams.name: Kelp Forest · Monterey Bay Aquarium
cams.description: Two-storey kelp forest exhibit with sardines, leopard sharks, sea bass and the occasional otter passing through.

cams.name: Bimini Shark Lab · Bahamas
cams.description: Long-running shark research field station founded by Dr. Samuel Gruber. Live and recorded footage of nurse, lemon, and hammerhead sharks.

cams.name: Decorah Bald Eagles · Iowa
cams.seasonalNote: Most active January-July during nesting and fledging.
cams.description: Famous bald-eagle nest cam at the Raptor Resource Project hatchery — millions of viewers watch each spring's eaglets fledge.

cams.name: Eiffel Tower · Paris
cams.description: Skyline Webcams' panoramic live view of the Eiffel Tower over the Seine.

cams.name: Tower Bridge · London
cams.description: Live view across the Thames at Tower Bridge — bascules raise periodically for tall ships.

cams.name: Bondi Beach · Sydney
cams.description: Live look at Australia's most famous beach — surf and sun in real time, Sydney's eastern suburbs.

cams.name: Marina Bay · Singapore
cams.description: Marina Bay Sands and the Singapore skyline — light show every evening at 8 and 9 PM SGT.

cams.name: Hollywood Walk of Fame · Los Angeles
cams.description: EarthCam's live cam at Hollywood Boulevard. Premieres, costumed performers, and tourist crowds.
